overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character galloping on horseback through rolling western grasslands and rocky terrain during golden hour. The rider traverses dirt trails, passes through rocky canyons, briefly rides alongside another horseman, and continues along cliff edges with expansive valley views.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered trees approaching rocky formations

agents.ego_description: galloping on horseback across open grassland toward distant rock cliffs, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock formation rising above the grassland
green leafy trees dotting the rolling hills
worn dirt path cutting through the grass
sunlit green grass covering gentle slopes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide grassland vista during golden hour. The camera follows a horse rider galloping along a dirt trail toward imposing rock cliffs visible in the distance. Scattered oak trees dot the landscape while warm sunlight casts long shadows across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon passage with overhanging cliffs

events.description: trail enters rocky canyon area with closer rock walls and denser vegetation

agents.ego_description: navigating horse through narrower rocky path with overhanging cliffs on the left

entered.detail: large rock formation creating partial cover over the trail
scattered large rocks and stone outcrops along the path

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows as it enters a rocky canyon section. The previously distant rock cliff now looms close on the left, forming an overhang in places. The path weaves between boulders and scrub vegetation while the sky becomes partially obscured by the rock walls.

events.description: another rider on a white horse appears ahead and rides parallel briefly before falling behind

agents.ego_description: riding along cliff edge and catching up to another horseman, then passing them

notable_agents.action: riding a white horse ahead on the trail, wearing similar western attire

entered.detail: expansive view of distant valleys and rolling terrain opening up to the right
leafless gnarled tree standing alone on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path emerges from the canyon onto a cliffside trail with expansive valley views opening to the right. Another rider on a white horse appears ahead and rides parallel for a moment. A distinctive dead tree stands on the right as the terrain opens up to reveal distant landscapes.

scene_state.functional_zone: valley overlook with distant water and red rock formations

events.description: trail opens to panoramic valley view with distant lake and red rock buttes visible

agents.ego_description: descending trail with expansive valley views, passing through grassy meadows toward distant water

entered.detail: body of water visible in the valley below reflecting the sky
distinctive red rock formations rising from the valley floor
scattered large rocks and stone outcrops along the descending path

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a breathtaking panoramic valley view with a distant lake and distinctive red rock buttes. The trail descends through grassy meadows dotted with boulders. The camera continues following the rider as they navigate the downward slope with the expansive western landscape stretching to the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open grassland vista into a narrow rocky canyon before emerging onto a high cliffside overlooking a vast valley. It begins with a horse rider galloping along a dirt trail through sun-drenched plains dotted with oak trees, moving steadily toward imposing rock cliffs. As the trail narrows, the scene shifts into a canyon where the towering rock walls loom close and partially obscure the golden sky. The path then opens up onto a cliffside trail, briefly riding parallel to another rider on a white horse past a solitary dead tree. Finally, the camera reveals a breathtaking panoramic view of red rock buttes and a distant lake as the rider descends through grassy, boulder-strewn meadows toward the horizon.
